summary: Swapped the orange Raw-Concrete ramp for warm walnut; tokenized radius, on-accent and shadow-border depth.
Replaced outline:none / box-shadow:none with a keyboard-only :focus-visible accent ring on tabs and grill buttons.
Space Grotesk + Public Sans baked in as base64 WOFF2 data URIs for zero-FOUT, fully offline docs.
themeFile full-replaces; themeTokens concatenates a :root patch onto the base — a 15-line block re-skins the whole surface.
